name: Digger Escape
author: Poki
description: Digger Escape is a survival game where the fate of humanity rests underground! With rogue AI wiping out cities, a group of engineers flees into the forest, armed with nothing but an old drill and a daring escape plan—build a rocket and flee Earth! Dig deep through a procedurally generated world filled with rare resources, construct powerful buildings, and complete all rocket stages to launch your escape. Can you outsmart the machines and build your way to freedom? How to play Digger Escape? Use your mouse, WASD, or the arrow keys to move. Who created Digger Escape? Digger Escape is created by Platonov Developer. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Digger Escape for free? You can play Digger Escape for free on Poki. Can I play Digger Escape on mobile devices and desktop? Digger Escape can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
